marshallese.the_earliest_fraction_notation_dates_t: Jeje in ṃōttan eo jinointata ej itok jān Egypt etto tarrin iiō 1800 BCE. Ri-Egypt raar kōjerbal "ṃōttan unit" — ṃōttan wōt me nōṃba ilōñ ej 1 (āinwōt 1/2, 1/3, 1/4). Raar je jabdewōt ṃōttan āinwōt aolepān in ṃōttan unit: 2/5 = 1/3 + 1/15. Jeje in bar eo raan kein (nōṃba ilōñ ioon nōṃba ilaḷ) ej itok jān ri-math in Arab tarrin iiō 1200 CE.
marshallese.where_do_the_fraction_words_come_from: Naan in ṃōttan rej itok jān ia?
marshallese.numerator_comes_from_the_latin_numerar: "Numerator" ej itok jān Latin "numerare" (bwini) — ej bwini jete ṃōttan. "Denominator" ej itok jān "denominare" (ṇaetan) — ej ṇaetan joñan in ṃōttan ko. Jiṃor: nōṃba ilaḷ ej ṇaetan kain ṃōttan; nōṃba ilōñ ej bwini jete iaan ṃōttan kaṇ kwōj bōk.
marshallese.decimals_as_we_know_them_were_populari: Decimal āinwōt jej jeḷā kaki raar buñbuñḷọk kōn Simon Stevin ilo 1585 ilo bok eo an "De Thiende" (Kein Ka-Joñoul). Ṃokta jān men in, ṃōttan wōt kar wāween in kwaḷọk nōṃba ko rejjab iio. Point in decimal ear buñbuñ ilo laḷ in aolep ilo iiō 1700 ko wōt.
marshallese.percent_comes_from_the_latin_per_centu: "Percent" ej itok jān Latin "per centum" — "ilo jibukwi." Kōn men in 25% meḷeḷe eo ej 25 ilo 100, ak 25/100. Kakōḷḷe % ear waḷọk jān kadikḷọk "per c." ilo jeje in wia an ri-Italy ilo iiō 1400 ko.
marshallese.the_reciprocal_of_a_b_is_b_a_flip_it_u: Reciprocal in a/b ej b/a — ukōt e. Kajjojo ṃōttan me ejjab zero ewor reciprocal. Product in ṃōttan im reciprocal eo an ej aolep iien 1: (3/4) × (4/3) = 12/12 = 1. Kōn men in ajej kōn ṃōttan ej āinwōt koorḷọk kōn reciprocal eo an.
marshallese.why_is_1_2_the_most_used_fraction: Etke 1/2 ej ṃōttan eo eḷap an kōjerbal?
marshallese.1_2_is_the_most_common_fraction_in_eve: 1/2 ej ṃōttan eo eḷap an waḷọk ilo kōnono in raan otemjej kōnke ej jijet ilikin eoḷap in 0 im 1. Ej barāinwōt ṃōttan eo wōt jej kwaḷọk kōn naan: "jimattan" jān "juon ioon ruo." Kajin ko jet ewor naan ko rejenolọk ñan 1/3 im 1/4 barāinwōt (ṃōttan jilu, kwarter).
marshallese.a_pizza_is_a_perfect_fraction_model_be: Pizza ej model in ṃōttan eweeppān kōnke ej doulul (kōn men in aolep ṃōttan rej waḷọk jān eoḷap), ṃōttan ko rej pidodo ñan bwini, im model eo ej ekkar ñan meḷeḷe in math ejjiṃwe: ṃōttan n/d ej n ṃōttan rejiṃor jān aolepān d ṃōttan rejiṃor.
marshallese.some_numbers_like_and_2_cannot_be_writ: Jet nōṃba, āinwōt π im √2, rejjab maroñ jeje āinwōt ṃōttan in ruo nōṃba iio. Rein rej etan nōṃba rejjab jiṃwe. Ri-Pythagoras (tarrin 500 BCE) rej ba raar ṃan ri-math Hippasus ilo iien eo ear kwaḷọk bwe √2 ejjab maroñ jeje āinwōt ṃōttan.
marshallese.any_real_number_can_be_written_as_a_co: Jabdewōt nōṃba eṃool emaroñ jeje āinwōt "ṃōttan ej wōnṃaanḷọk" — juon ṃōttan ilowaan āinwōt 1 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + ...))). Men in ej leḷọk kōkkar in ṃōttan reṃṃan tata. π ≈ 22/7 jān naan ko iiet ṃokta; eṃṃan tata ej 355/113.
marshallese.musical_pitch_ratios_are_fractions_the: Ratio in ainikien music ej ṃōttan. Octave ej ratio 2:1 (frequency ej ruoḷọk). Fifth eweeppān ej 3:2. Third eḷap ej 5:4. Pythagoras ear lo bwe ratio in nōṃba iio repidodo rej kōṃṃan ainikien reṃṃan.
marshallese.two_pizzas_can_only_be_combined_if_the: Ruo pizza remaroñ wōt koba ñe eṃōj ṃwijit er ñan ṃōttan joñan wōt juon. Nōṃba ilaḷ rejenolọk = ṃōttan joñan rejenolọk = rejjab maroñ koba kiiō wōt. Nōṃba ilaḷ jiṃor meḷeḷe eo ej "ṃōttan joñan wōt juon."
marshallese.a_batting_average_like_333_means_1_3_o: Average in deñdeñ āinwōt .333 meḷeḷe eo ej 1/3 in deñdeñ ko rej kōṃṃan juon hit. ERA in ri-jibwe, percent in pād-ilo-base, percent in slugging — aolep rej ṃōttan. Baseball ej kar kukure eo ṃokta ear kabuñbuñ kain ḷōmṇak in stat, jino ilo iiō 1850 ko.
marshallese.georges_cuisenaire_was_a_belgian_prima: Georges Cuisenaire ej kar ri-kaki in jikuuḷ dik in Belgium ilo iiō 1950 ko me ear kōṃṃan aḷaḷ rekōkmeej kōn aetok 1 ñan 10 ñan jipañ ajri ñan jibwe kōtaan in nōṃba koba kōn ṃōttan. "Kiin ṃōttan" eo kwōj loe ilo elōñ kilaaj ej nejin digital in aḷaḷ ko an rewāween.
marshallese.the_chinese_mathematical_text_nine_cha: Jeje in math an China "Ruwatimjuon Chapter kōn Kapeel in Math" (tarrin 100 BCE) ear koba bōnbōn in ṃōttan, koba wāween in pukot nōṃba ilaḷ jiṃor me ej jejaik ippān ta eo jej katakin rainin.
marshallese.computers_store_decimal_fractions_in_b: Computer rej kōjọ ṃōttan decimal ilo binary. Decimal 0.1 ejjab maroñ kwaḷọk jiṃwe ilo binary — ej erom ṃōttan ej bar waḷọk ilo base 2. Kōn men in 0.1 + 0.2 jet iien ej leḷọk 0.30000000000000004 ilo kajin in programming.

marshallese.real_world_fraction_facts_from_the_ani: Ṃool in ṃōttan in laḷ ilijjukwi jān aelōñ in menninmour. Kōjerbal āinwōt kajjitōk in journal, men in kaitok-ḷōmṇak, ak kōpooḷ-jikuuḷ ñan science.

Ñe rej ba "Ijaje ewi wāween jino," kajjitōk "Ta eo apañ ej kajjitōk bwe kwōn pukot? Ta eo jej jeḷā?" System in hint ilo Word Problems ej leḷọk hint elōñ layer — kajjioñ eo ṃokta ṃokta jān uwaak.
marshallese.ies_practice_guide_recommends_1_magnit: IES Practice Guide ej rojak: (1) ḷōmṇak in joñan (jerbal in line in nōṃba), (2) kōtaan in alikkar im symbolic, (3) apañ in naan ilo context. KŌJPARŌK: kaṃṃinene procedure ilo ejjeḷọk meḷeḷe. Kōjerbal 5 minute ilo Benchmark Trainer, 5 ilo Word Problems, im 5 ilo kukure — eñin ej session in 15-minute eṃṃan.

Kwaḷọk Cheat Sheet ñan er — remaroñ etale jerbal eo aer jekjek-ilọk-jekjek. Rōjañ er ñan kaṃool kōn wāween eo juon (kōttōbalbal ṃokta, ak kōjerbal model eo juon).

marshallese.let_your_number_be_n_the_sequence_n_1_: Kōṃṃan bwe nōṃba eo aṃ en n. Laajrak eo: (n+1) × 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n + 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n. Ajej kōn 2 → n. Bōkḷọk eo jinointata → 0. Kōttar — eñin ej leḷọk 0, jab 1. Kajjioñ: n → (n+1)×2 = 2n+2 → +4 = 2n+6 → −6 = 2n → ÷2 = n → −jinointata = 0. "Ṃoṇ" eo ej pedped ioon constant ko rej ṇooj ilo laajrak.
marshallese.each_term_is_half_the_previous_the_tot: Kajjojo naan ej jimattan in eo ṃokta. Aolepān ej epaakḷọk ñan 1 ak ejjab tōpar e ñan indeeo. Eñin ej series in geometric in ejjeḷọk jeṃḷọk kōn naan kein kajuon 1/2 im ratio 1/2: S = (1/2) / (1 − 1/2) = 1. Kōn men in paradox in ṃakūtkūt an Zeno emaroñ kōṃadṃōd ilo math.
marshallese.even_though_each_term_is_small_the_ser: Meñe kajjojo naan edik, series eo ej depakpakḷọk. Ñan eḷḷā jān 100, kwōj aikuj tarrin 1.5 × 10^43 naan. Men in eṃōj kaṃoole kōn Nicole Oresme ilo iiō 1300 ko kōn kōjerbal koba: 1/3 + 1/4 > 1/4 + 1/4 = 1/2; 1/5+...+1/8 > 4 × 1/8 = 1/2; kwōmaroñ aolep iien pukot bar juon 1/2 ñan koba.
marshallese.check_1_4_and_1_3_4_1_1_3_1_check_2_5_: Etale 1/4 im 1/3: (4)(1) − (1)(3) = 1. Etale 2/5 im 1/2: (5)(1) − (2)(2) = 1. Kadkad in ej kōṃṃan wōjke in Stern-Brocot in aolep nōṃba rational.
marshallese.rewrite_1_2_2_3_3_4_n_1_n_the_2_in_2_3: Bar je: 1/2 × 2/3 × 3/4 × ... × (n−1)/n. 2 ilo 2/3 ej jeorḷọk 2 ilo nōṃba ilaḷ in 1/2. 3 ilo 3/4 ej jeorḷọk 3 ilo nōṃba ilaḷ in 2/3. Aolep men ej jeorḷọk ijellọkun 1/n.
marshallese.mathematical_tricks_that_are_really_el: "Ṃoṇ" in math me rej eṃool identity in ṃōttan reṃṃan. Kāālōt juon ñan lo kōṃṃan, kwaḷọk, im kōmelele in math.
marshallese.a_standard_inch_ruler_is_divided_into_: Ruler in inch ejjiṃwe ej ajejḷọk ñan 16ths. Line reḷap: inch. Kakōḷḷe in jimattan: 1/2 inch. Kakōḷḷe in kwarter: 1/4 inch. Kajjojo ṃōttan edik tata: 1/16 inch.
marshallese.inch_rulers_use_binary_fractions_halve: Ruler in inch rej kōjerbal ṃōttan binary: jimattan, kwarter, eighth, sixteenth.
marshallese.a_12_foot_tape_measure_has_marks_every: Tape in joñe in 12-foot ewor kakōḷḷe ilo kajjojo 1/16 inch. Kōjerbal ej waḷọk: riit ñan 1/8 ak 1/16 epaak tata. Diamond kilmeej ilo kajjojo 19 3/16 inch rej kakōḷḷe kōtaan in joist eṃōj kōṃṃane.
marshallese.each_16_inches_has_a_black_diamond_for: Kajjojo 16 inch ewor juon diamond kilmeej ñan kōtaan in stud ejjiṃwe.
marshallese.a_standard_set_includes_1_cup_1_2_1_3_: Set ejjiṃwe ewor 1 cup, 1/2, 1/3, 1/4. Jet set rej koba 2/3 im 3/4. Cup in joñe in glass ewor kakōḷḷe ñan 1/4, 1/3, 1/2, 2/3, 3/4 cup im 1 cup.
marshallese.you_can_combine_smaller_measures_to_ma: Kwōmaroñ koba joñe re-dik ñan kōṃṃan jabdewōt ṃōttan ejjiṃwe.
marshallese.a_medical_thermometer_shows_tenths_of_: Thermometer in taktō ej kwaḷọk tenth in degree. 98.6°F = 98 + 6/10 = 98.6. Thermometer in glass ekkā an kwaḷọk jimattan-degree.
marshallese.each_minor_tick_is_usually_1_10_of_a_d: Kajjojo tick edik ekkā an 1/10 in degree.
marshallese.most_fuel_gauges_show_divisions_at_e_e: Enañin aolep gauge in fuel rej kwaḷọk ajej ilo E (ejjeḷọk), 1/4, 1/2, 3/4, F (obrak). Gauge in digital raan kein remaroñ kwaḷọk medo in 1/8 ak pāājent ejjiṃwe.
